lines: Iri  joro, yemwe bakristo  mwese, Turabibuts' Umwana w'Imana, Uko yaje kuducungura twese,Ngw Iman' izadukure mu byaha.Abo mw isi bose banezerewe Iri joro, bibuk' Umukiza. Mupfukame,
Kwizigira kwacu, bakristo mwese,Kudutere guhimbaz' Umwami; Inyenyeri y’
iracyaka kw ijuru Ahw abanyabwenge bayibonye. Uwo Mwami yashyizwe mu muvure: Mubimenye, rubanda mwese mwe ! Munezerwe kukw Iman' ibikiza. Munezerwe, mwambaz' uwo Mwami ! (x 2)
Umukiza yabakuye mu kaga No mu buretwa bw'umwanzi mubi. Mwes' abita ben'
Imana Rurema; Abigish' iby'urukundo rwayo.Tumwerurire yuko
tumukunda:Yadupfiriye ku Musaraba. Rubanda mwe, mwishime cyane none !
